productDisplayName: Puma Men Originals Billfold Black Wallet
description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from puma's Original Billford range. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Made of synthetic leather with puma Jumping cat and branding in distress print on the outside and embossed on the insideOne main chamber for keeping cashThree small convenient chambers to hold cards One small pouch to hold coinsStitch detailing for durability and styleCareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
